title: Photocell Switch Price in Pakistan 2026 — LDR Switch, Automatic Street Light Controller & Dawn-to-Dusk Switch Complete Buyer Guide
meta_description: Photocell switch prices Pakistan 2026: Rs 150–2,500. LDR switch, dawn-to-dusk controller, automatic street light switch — types, wiring, lux settings & where to buy.
summary_html: Photocell switch prices in Pakistan 2026 range from Rs 150 (basic inline LDR switch) to Rs 2,500 (adjustable-lux IP65 industrial controller). This guide covers all types — inline, screw-in socket, surface-mount, dawn-to-dusk adjustable, industrial IP65, and DC solar models — with 2026 verified prices, correct wiring for Pakistan 220V AC, lux threshold settings for Pakistani climate conditions, monsoon calibration guide, failure mode analysis, and a complete Pakistan application matrix covering gate lights, tubewell compound lighting, mosque exterior, municipal street lights, and solar street light integration.
